creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: hselasky
Date: Thu Nov 19 10:01:50 UTC 2015
New revision: 291066
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/291066

Log:
  MFC r290639:
  Update the wsp driver to support newer touch pads, like found in
  MacBookPro11,4 and MacBook12,1. This update adds support for the
  force touch parameter.

  PR:		204420

Changes:
_U  stable/9/sys/
_U  stable/9/sys/dev/
  stable/9/sys/dev/usb/input/wsp.c
  stable/9/sys/dev/usb/usbdevs
